The '''Mark II Powersuit''' was a [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] developed by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]]. The suit was specialized for use in rescue missions and was used by local governments. The suit came equipped with a [[Laser cutter/Legends|cutting laser]] to help free individuals trapped by rubble or from compromised buildings.<ref name="EJ" />

{{Clothes-stub}}
